source_name: Hillhouse Perspectives on The Long Term
method_claim: Long-term equity ownership requires patience discipline strategic ambiguity tolerance and focus on exceptional entrepreneurs.
workflow_use: Supports long-horizon mindset, patience, strategic ambiguity and company-quality lens.
coverage_contribution: Improves Asia/private-practitioner coverage using an official public source.
remaining_limit: High-level philosophy; not an executable public equity workflow.

method_claim: Research uncovers obscure signals, connects emerging trends and anticipates future needs; approach emphasizes alignment quality sustainability and long-term rigor.
workflow_use: Supports theme-to-company handoff, emerging-trend research and quality/sustainability lens.
coverage_contribution: Adds current public statement of Asian buyside research culture.
remaining_limit: Still does not disclose portfolio construction or case underwriting details.

source_name: 平安资产管理权益投资优势
method_claim: 权益投资以基本面分析为核心，自下而上选股结合自上而下行业研究，并重视定性定量、财务分析与草根研究。
workflow_use: Supports combining company, industry, financial and grassroots evidence in a Chinese institutional context.
remaining_limit: Public page is broad and promotional; requires external reviewer acceptance for methodology use.

source_name: J.P. Morgan Long-Term Capital Market Assumptions
method_claim: Long-term assumptions use a 10-15 year horizon and structured asset-class assumptions; changing regimes can affect winners and losers.
workflow_use: Supports macro-regime and long-horizon expectation discipline.

source_name: J.P. Morgan principles for successful long-term investing
method_claim: Time horizon, planning and diversification reduce behavioral errors and volatility sensitivity.
workflow_use: Supports discipline against short-term noise and behavioral overreaction.
remaining_limit: Not sufficient for company-level thesis validation.
